name: Pagar.me
description: Brazilian payment platform processing credit cards, Pix, and boleto with developer-friendly APIs and SDKs.

seo.title: Pagar.me — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Pagar.me: Brazilian payment platform processing credit cards, Pix, and boleto with developer-friendly APIs and SDKs.

when_to_use: Processing credit cards and Pix for Brazilian e-commerce
Boleto bancário acceptance with payment confirmation webhooks
Split payments for Brazilian marketplace sellers
Subscription billing with Pix and card recurring charges

review.verdict: Solid Brazilian gateway with good DX, but Portuguese-heavy ops and BR-only scope limit global teams.
review.best_for: Brazilian e-commerce and SaaS needing unified Pix, card, and boleto processing
review.not_for: Global merchants or teams without Portuguese-speaking support staff
